DP.117.0000:
Hiya!
Oh, you’re a Trainer!\f
That means you’re using Pokémon
Boxes! I love meeting end users!\f
Oh, what’s up?
Why that astonished look?\f
Oh, right, sorry!
There I go running my mouth again!\f
My name’s Bebe!\f
You know the PC Pokémon Boxes?
I’m the system administrator!
DP.117.0001:
Bebe: My buddy Bill developed the
basic storage system.\f
I tinkered with it here and there
to make it easier for me to use.
DP.117.0002:
Bebe: Hiya! Been a long time!
How’s it going? Using the PC Boxes?\f
Oh? Now lookie here, that’s a National
Pokédex I’m seeing. Good for you!\f
You’ll be using my Boxes like crazy
if you’re using that now.\f
Well, I always thought a good Trainer
ought to juggle Boxes smartly, though\r
I shouldn’t be the one to say so.\f
Oh yeah, do you want a Pokémon named
EEVEE?
DP.117.0003:
Bebe: So, do you want that EEVEE
that I’ve got?
DP.117.0004:
Bebe: Here you go!
Now, you be good to it.\f
DP.117.0006:
Would you like to give a nickname
to the EEVEE that Bebe gave you?
DP.117.0007:
Bebe: Here you go!\f
Wait, I can’t do that! You can’t
take any more Pokémon with you!\f
Right about now, my Pokémon Boxes
come in handy!
DP.117.0008:
Bebe: Oh, OK...
Guess I’ll have to raise it myself.
DP.117.0009:
Bebe: That EEVEE I gave you,
I got it from a good mate in Johto.\f
Who knows how many EEVEE he’s raised
over the years.
